---
title: "progress-report-seb46051"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#install necessary packages
library(rvest)
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(Lahman)
```

get the data from site
```{r}
url<- "https://www.baseball-reference.com/awards/hof_2026.shtml"
html<- read_html(url)
tables<- html_table(html)

#inspect table of interest
#head(tables[[1]])
#str(tables[[1]])

#fix column names
dat<- tables[[1]]
col_names<- dat[1,]
colnames(dat)<- col_names
dat<- dat[-1,]
head(dat)

#change and add the necessary variables
dat$Rk<- as.numeric(dat$Rk)
dat$Votes<- as.numeric(dat$Votes)
dat$`%vote`<- parse_number(dat$`%vote`)
dat$year<- rep(2026, nrow(dat))
dat$inducted<- ifelse(dat$Votes>=319, "Y", "N")

#remove any unwanted characters
dat$Name<- gsub("X-", "", dat$Name)

dat<- dat %>%
  select(Rk, Name, Votes, `%vote`, year, inducted)
dat

lahman_2026 <- HallOfFame %>% 
  filter(yearID == 2026)


dat %>% 
  count(inducted)

lahman_2026 %>% 
  count(votedBy, inducted)

write.csv(dat, file="2026_dat.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```
